summary: A brief LinkedIn profile summary detailing Andrew Ng's professional background, including his roles at Stanford University, Coursera, and Google Brain. It highlights his foundational work in deep learning, robotics, and online education, as well as his core finding that scaling data and compute drives significant AI performance gains.

principles.statement: Scaling up data and compute leads to huge performance improvements in AI.
principles.rationale: This was the foundational proof point for the Google Brain team, demonstrating that leveraging massive compute infrastructure and data could transform AI capabilities and drive business applications.
principles.source_quote: Using Google's compute infrastructure, we started by proving that scaling up data and compute leads to huge performance improvements

signature_quotes.text: Using Google's compute infrastructure, we started by proving that scaling up data and compute leads to huge performance improvements
signature_quotes.context: Describing the foundational work and success of the Google Brain team.
